case_title: THE PRINT SHOP, INC. VS. SANJEEV DUTTA

docket_entries.description: REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON 10/14/2025.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $408.00 FILED BY THE PRINT SHOP, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DUTTA, SANJEEV INSTANT COPYING AND LASER PRINTING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-05-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$35.00) SERVED DEC-09-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DUTTA, SANJEEV INSTANT COPYING AND LASER PRINTING

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PRINT SHOP, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DUTTA, SANJEEV INSTANT COPYING AND LASER PRINTING CLAIM HEARING OF JAN-05-2011 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
